about.heading: About
about.description: Senior Frontend Engineer with 9+ years of experience building scalable SaaS and enterprise products using Vue, Nuxt, React, and TypeScript. Passionate about frontend architecture, performance, and great user experiences.

experiences.description: Leading frontend initiatives while managing engineering teams. Built EUDR compliance workflows, integrated with EU Information System (EUIS), implemented shared authentication across internal applications, and collaborated directly with European stakeholders on product direction and technical execution.

Led frontend architecture and technical direction across hotel, flight, train, and activity booking products. Migrated legacy Laravel applications to Nuxt SSR, improved checkout performance by 67%, and delivered bundled travel booking experiences.
Built and scaled travel booking platforms, contributed to design system adoption, search optimization, and frontend modernization initiatives across multiple business verticals.
